mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, form_model_key, form_model_name, form_model_url, form_model_start_url, de_form_id, `status`, flags, model_key, model_version, biz_id, form_model_url_app, form_model_start_url_app, task_title, task_type, app_key
mapper.insert: insert into t_wf_re_form_model (gmt_create, gmt_modified, form_model_key, form_model_name, form_model_url, form_model_start_url, de_form_id, `status`, flags, model_key, model_version, biz_id, form_model_url_app, form_model_start_url_app, task_title, task_type, app_key ) values (#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{formModelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formModelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formModelUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formModelStartUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deFormId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{bizId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formModelUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formModelStartUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskTitle,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{taskType,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update t_wf_re_form_model set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, form_model_key = #{formModelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, form_model_name = #{formModelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, form_model_url = #{formModelUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, form_model_start_url = #{formModelStartUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, de_form_id = #{deFormId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, model_key = #{modelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_version = #{modelVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, biz_id = #{bizId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, form_model_url_app = #{formModelUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, form_model_start_url_app = #{formModelStartUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_title = #{taskTitle,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, task_type = #{taskType,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_wf_re_form_model (gmt_create, gmt_modified, form_model_key, form_model_name, form_model_url, form_model_start_url, de_form_id, `status`, flags, model_key, model_version, biz_id, form_model_url_app, form_model_start_url_app, task_title, task_type, app_key) values
(#{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.formModelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.formModelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.formModelUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.formModelStartUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.deFormId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.modelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.modelVersion,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.bizId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.formModelUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.formModelStartUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskTitle,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.taskType,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select model_version from t_wf_re_form_model where form_model_key = #{formModelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by model_version desc limit 1

select id, form_model_key, form_model_name, form_model_url, form_model_start_url, de_form_id, biz_id, form_model_url_app, form_model_start_url_app, task_title, task_type from t_wf_re_form_model where form_model_key = #{formModelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by id desc limit 1
select model_version from t_wf_re_form_model where model_key = #{modelKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by model_version desc limit 1

select a.* from t_wf_re_form_model a inner join ( select max(id) id from t_wf_re_form_model
and form_model_name like concat('%', #{likeFormModelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
and app_key=#{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and `status` = 0
group by form_model_key )b on a.id = b.id
